name: Ham Steak with Cranberries
recipeIngredient: 2 ham steaks or 4-1/2 inch thick slices of leftover baked ham
Grated rind and juice from 1 orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak a clay pot in water for 10 minutes.
2. Place the ham steaks in the pot.
3. Dot each steak with butter.
4. Add all remaining ingredients to the pot.
5. Cover and place in a cold oven.
6. Adjust the heat to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) and cook for 35 minutes.
Note: If you crack the pot, it can be repaired using two-part epoxy that withstands oven temperatures. The author recommends Elmer's Two-Part Epoxy, but another brand may be used if unavailable.
